case_title: CHERI MCCLENDON VS. MELVIN LINARES RAMIREZ

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-27-2024 CONTINUED TO NOV-05-2024 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING NOV-05-2024 AT 10:30 AM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT. JUDGE: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO; CLERK: M. MACADANGDANG; PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED. (610)

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-07-2024 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance by self-represented plaintiff. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed by self-represented plaintiff, the Court orders the case dismissed. Judge: Anne-Christine Massullo; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-27-2024 Continued To Nov-05-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Berenice Quirino, Esq. specially appearing for plaintiff via court call. Melvin Ramirez, defendant, with court Spanish interpreter Monica Hernandez, present in court. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to November 5, 2024 at 10:30am in Department 610. If there is no compliance prior to the hearing, the case will be dismissed. Judge: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Proceedings not reported. (610)

NOTE: Per the Court, Mr. Ramirez does not need to appear at the next OSC hearing.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-31-2024 Continued To Aug-27-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-26-2024 Continued To Jun-25-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Cheri McClendon, self-represented plaintiff appearing on her own behalf. Defendant Melvin Linares is also present, together with court-appointed Spanish interpreter Monica Hernandez. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to June 25, 2024 at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: SAMUEL K. FENG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-25-2024 Continued To Mar-26-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Cheri McClendon, self-represented Plaintiff.
Melvin Linares, self-represented Defendant.

The Court asked Plaintiff if she has summons and complaint papers to serve on defendant with her. Plaintiff did not have summons and complaint. Plaintiff had copies of order to show cause notices and unfiled POS-040. The clerk informed plaintiff to use mandatory judicial council form POS-010 when filing proof of service on summons and complaint.
The Order to Show Cause is re-set to March 26, 2024 at 10:30am in Department 610.
Judge: Anne-Christine Massullo; Clerk: S. Le; Proceedings not reported. (610)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-16-2023 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jan-23-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-16-2023 Continued To Dec-13-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
